name: Toggle Lan Switch to reset modbus
store values
prepare read
prepare write
readme
info:
Select a modbus server:
ip nummer of the device and add port number 502
example: 192.168.178.55:502

Do this for the modbus read node and for the 
modbus write node.

Also change in the prepare nodes if necessary
the fc value for special registers.

name: Version 1.11
info:
1.00 expanded tooling, for 3th battery just copy nodes
1.01 added soc and fw version per stacked battery, soc is in 0.1% accuracy
1.10 Cleaned up for new release
1.11 Added 3th battery fields, combined fw readout

name: Force Mode M1
info:
Schrijf 21930 naar 42000.
Schrijf 95% naar 42011.
Schrijf 1 naar 43000 (Zet in Self-Consumption modus)

name: work arround for max 1500W discharge issue | Enable Set
info:
this flow sets the power selected with the 
slider in the UI to the max discharge register


I have 2 venus A sets and one has this problem caused by 
something in the firmware.
